inference_steps: The relevant sequence is the green chutney montage that includes ingredient labels followed by the instruction "GRIND IT IN A MIXER".
Before the mixer instruction, the grounded ordered ingredient labels are: 1st "GINGER & GARLIC", 2nd "FRESH CORRIANDER AND MINT LEAVES", 3rd "GREEN CHILLIES".
Therefore, the 2nd ingredient to get ground in the mixer is "FRESH CORRIANDER AND MINT LEAVES".
The 2nd word of "FRESH CORRIANDER AND MINT LEAVES" is "CORRIANDER", whose 1st letter is C.
Among the options, the choice matching the first letter C is "D. C.".

evidence.evidence_text: The green chutney ingredient montage with on-screen ingredient labels and the instruction "GRIND IT IN A MIXER" occurs from 27.00s to 37.00s.

Within the montage, the grounded frame analysis identifies the ingredient labels "GINGER & GARLIC", "FRESH CORRIANDER AND MINT LEAVES", and "GREEN CHILLIES", and later shows the instruction "GRIND IT IN A MIXER". The same analysis states the chronological order before the instruction as 1st: "GINGER & GARLIC", 2nd: "FRESH CORRIANDER AND MINT LEAVES", 3rd: "GREEN CHILLIES". It also identifies the 2nd word of "FRESH CORRIANDER AND MINT LEAVES" as "CORRIANDER".
